title: ChurnPredictionInput
description: Input features for Telco customer churn prediction (match AutoGluon/deployment training columns).

SeniorCitizen.description: Whether the customer is a senior citizen (0 or 1).

Partner.description: Whether the customer has a partner.

tenure.description: Number of months the customer has been with the company.

PhoneService.description: Whether the customer has phone service.

MultipleLines.description: Whether the customer has multiple lines.

OnlineSecurity.description: Whether the customer has online security.

OnlineBackup.description: Whether the customer has online backup.

DeviceProtection.description: Whether the customer has device protection.

TechSupport.description: Whether the customer has tech support.

StreamingTV.description: Whether the customer has streaming TV.

StreamingMovies.description: Whether the customer has streaming movies.

PaperlessBilling.description: Whether the customer uses paperless billing.

TotalCharges.description: Total charges (can be numeric or string in CSV; use number for API).
